category_sources: Official GitHub README describes Fresh as a modern, full-featured terminal text editor.
source_facts.description says Text editor for your terminal: easy, powerful and fast.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README and documentation site use Fresh.
source_facts.name is fresh-editor, but the executable and project branding are Fresh.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README links Documentation at getfresh.dev and a User Guide.
getfresh.dev documentation says it covers core features, configuration, and plugins.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/sinelaw/fresh, so repo is not re-determined per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README describes Fresh as a terminal text editor with IDE-level features.
